overall.description: Gameplay footage from a gothic horror game (Bloodborne) showing a hunter character exploring a grand cathedral-like interior. The character ascends a monumental staircase, discovers a hidden chamber behind a statue, explores a furnished room with a fireplace, and navigates back through narrow corridors. The environment features ornate stone architecture, candlelit lighting, and atmospheric blue-green tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic cathedral hall with grand staircase

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the grand stone staircase toward the large statue at the top

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with worn steps leading upward
monumental robed figure holding a staff at the top of the stairs
elaborate multi-armed candle holders with lit flames
tall gothic pillars supporting the vaulted ceiling
intricate ribbed vaulting with stone tracery overhead

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending a grand stone staircase within a gothic cathedral hall. Ornate candelabras line the path, and a massive statue looms at the top of the stairs. The environment is dimly lit with cool blue-green stone tones.

events.description: character walks behind the large statue into a hidden chamber
camera tilts up to reveal stained glass dome with colored light filtering through

agents.ego_description: approaching the statue and entering the hidden chamber behind it to inspect the stone chest

entered.detail: small enclosed space behind the statue with carved stone walls
ornate coffin-like container with metal bands and candles around it
circular stained glass window with blue and red patterns in the ceiling
clusters of lit candles arranged on the floor and ledges

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the top of the stairs and enters a hidden chamber behind the statue. Inside, a stone chest sits surrounded by candles beneath a stained glass dome. The lighting shifts to a mix of candlelight and colored light from above.

events.description: exits the hidden chamber and begins ascending the side staircase

agents.ego_description: exiting the hidden chamber and climbing the side staircase to reach the upper level

entered.detail: curved stone staircase with ornate railing leading upward
stone balcony overlooking the main hall below
dark wooden door with decorative glass panels and silver scrollwork

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the hidden chamber and ascends a side staircase with ornate railings. The path leads to a wooden door with decorative glass panels, offering a brief view of the main hall from a balcony.

scene_state.functional_zone: furnished room with fireplace and seating area

events.description: enters the furnished room through the wooden door
character stops walking to look around and examine the fireplace area

agents.ego_description: entering the furnished room and exploring the interior, examining the fireplace and chess table

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with active flames and a coat of arms above
octagonal wooden table with a chessboard pattern on top
upholstered Victorian-style chairs arranged around the table
four-poster bed with draped green curtains and red bedding
high arched ceiling with intricate stone ribbing

segments.scene_description: The character enters a furnished room featuring a lit fireplace, comfortable seating, and a canopy bed. The warm firelight contrasts with the cool stone architecture. The character pauses to examine the room's details including a chess table and ornate rug.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor and return to main hall

events.description: exits the furnished room through a narrow side passage
emerges onto balcony overlooking the main hall with grand staircase visible

agents.ego_description: leaving the room through a narrow corridor and descending back to the main hall via the balcony

entered.detail: confined stone passage with stacked books along the walls
large circular mirror with ornate frame leaning against the wall
piles of leather-bound books stacked on the floor
upper level balcony with view of the main hall below
the main staircase now viewed from above

segments.scene_description: The character exits through a narrow corridor lined with books and a round mirror, emerging onto a balcony overlooking the main hall. The character then descends, returning to the grand staircase area where the journey began.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the cold, monumental scale of a gothic cathedral into the intimate warmth of private quarters before returning to the open hall. It begins with an ascent up a grand stone staircase lined with candelabras, moving through cool blue-green tones toward a looming statue. As the character reaches the summit, the scene shifts into a hidden chamber where the lighting transforms into a blend of flickering candlelight and colored hues filtering through a stained glass dome. The camera then follows a path up a side staircase and through a decorative glass door, transitioning from the airy balcony into a furnished room illuminated by the warm glow of a lit fireplace. Finally, the movement leads through a narrow, book-lined corridor and past a round mirror, emerging back onto the balcony to descend toward the grand staircase where the journey started.
